JAMES LESS, ESQ.'S, 415-398-9800, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT KAI TAMAR HARE.
Tuija Catalano, Esq., 415-567-9000 for plaintiff and opposing party Eric Brondfield.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED THE FOLLOWING RULING RE:
LAWRENCE JAMES LESS, ESQ.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT KAI HARE. IF COUNSEL MOVING TO WITHDRAW CAN SUBMIT TO THE COURT A CONTINUANCE DATE FOR THE MOTION TO COMPEL SCHEDULED FOR 8/23/05 IN DISCOVERY DEPT. OR DECLARES THAT DEFENDANT, KAI TAMAR HARE DOES NOT MIND RESPRESENTING HERSELF AND FOR THE DISCOVERY DATE THAN COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW)
